name: Centier Bank
description_short: Family-owned Indiana bank established in 1895, offering FDIC-insured checking, savings, CDs, mortgages, and business banking services across multiple locations.
description_long: Centier Bank is a private, family-owned bank headquartered in Indiana with a banking heritage dating back to 1895. The bank has committed to remaining independent and privately held through their "Not For Sale" promise, distinguishing them from larger corporate banking chains. They serve both personal and business customers across multiple locations in Indiana. Centier offers a comprehensive suite of traditional banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with competitive rates (up to 3.75% APY on 8-month CDs and Money Market Accounts), personal mortgages, business banking services, and credit cards. The bank also provides SBA lending for small businesses and has demonstrated 18+ years of experience as an SBA Preferred Lender. All deposits are FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. What distinguishes Centier is their deep community commitment, having supported 3,000+ organizations with $18M+ in community impact and 162,000+ volunteer hours. Their "Not For Sale" pledge explicitly commits to remaining a family-owned, private institution rather than pursuing acquisition or going public. The bank emphasizes accessibility through AudioEye-enabled website optimization and offers modern conveniences like online banking, e-delivery services, and appointment booking. Centier is best suited for Indiana customers seeking a relationship-driven banking experience from an established, locally-invested institution. However, as a regional bank, they may have limited branch presence compared to national banks and may not offer the same digital-first experience as newer neobanks. Their product offerings are traditional and competitive but not necessarily innovative.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with up to 3.75% APY
SBA lending and SBA Preferred Lender programs
Appointment booking and customer service consultation
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full government backing for account protection
Competitive CD rates up to 3.75% APY on 8-month terms and Money Market Accounts
18+ years of SBA lending experience with SBA Preferred Lender status for small business support
Strong community commitment with $18M+ impact and 3,000+ organizations supported
"Not For Sale" commitment ensures continued private, family-owned operations for generations
Established history since 1895 provides institutional stability and local market knowledge
Referral rewards program offering $50 cash for both referrer and new customer
cons: Regional bank limited to Indiana locations, restricting accessibility for out-of-state customers
No mention of mobile-first banking app or digital wallet integrations on homepage
Limited product innovation compared to national banks and neobanks
Website content does not detail minimum balance requirements, monthly fees, or overdraft policies
No information provided about business checking account types or features available
best_for: Indiana residents seeking FDIC-insured checking and savings with local banking relationship
Small business owners qualifying for SBA lending and preferential business banking services
Savers looking for competitive CD and Money Market Account rates
Customers who prioritize community investment and want to support a family-owned institution
diagnosis: Centier Bank is ideal for Indiana-based consumers and small business owners who value stability, community impact, and relationship banking from a long-established, family-owned institution. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Indiana locations and lack of cutting-edge digital banking features compared to national competitors or fintech alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
